tools.title: Code Beautifier
tools.desc: Format HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and JSON in your browser with readable indentation and quick copy tools.
tools.pill: Code formatter for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and JSON

tools.title: Code Minifier
tools.desc: Minify HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and JSON online to reduce size and remove unnecessary whitespace.
tools.pill: Code minifier for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and JSON

tools.title: JSON Formatter
tools.desc: Pretty print, validate, and clean JSON online with fast browser-based formatting and copy tools.
tools.pill: JSON format, minify, and validation tool

tools.title: SQL Formatter
tools.desc: Format SQL queries online for better readability with line breaks, spacing, and clean layout.

tools.title: UUID Generator
tools.desc: Generate random UUIDs online for identifiers, testing, mock data, and development workflows.
tools.pill: UUID creation for development and testing

tools.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
tools.desc: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings online with instant browser-based conversion.

tools.title: Special Characters
tools.desc: Copy special characters, symbols, arrows, currency marks, and common Unicode characters quickly.
tools.pill: Special symbols and Unicode character helper

tools.title: Text Cleaner
tools.desc: Clean text online by removing extra spaces, blank lines, duplicate lines, and messy formatting.

tools.title: HTML Escape / Unescape
tools.desc: Escape HTML special characters to entities or unescape them back to readable text in your browser.

tools.title: Document Diff Checker
tools.desc: Compare two text blocks line by line online and highlight changes, removals, and additions.

tools.title: Case Converter
tools.desc: Convert text into uppercase, lowercase, camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and title case online.

tools.title: QR Code Generator
tools.desc: Create QR codes online from text or URLs and download the result as a PNG image.
tools.pill: QR code creation from text and links

tools.title: Word Counter
tools.desc: Count words, characters, lines, and bytes online with instant browser-based text analysis.

tools.title: Password Generator
tools.desc: Generate strong random passwords online with options for length, uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.

tools.title: URL Encoder / Decoder
tools.desc: Encode or decode URLs and query strings online for safe sharing, debugging, and parameter handling.

tools.title: Hash Generator
tools.desc: Generate SHA-256 and SHA-1 hashes online in your browser for quick testing and verification work.

tools.title: Regex Tester
tools.desc: Test regular expressions online with live match results, flags, and quick browser-based feedback.

tools.title: Timestamp Converter
tools.desc: Convert Unix timestamps to readable date strings and turn readable dates back into timestamps online.

tools.title: Color Converter
tools.desc: Convert HEX, RGB, and HSL color values online with a live preview for design and front-end work.
tools.pill: HEX, RGB, and HSL color conversion

tools.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.desc: Generate placeholder paragraphs online for UI mockups, CMS drafts, design previews, and layout testing.

tools.title: HTML Preview
tools.desc: Write HTML and preview the rendered result side by side online without leaving the browser.
tools.pill: HTML live preview in the browser

tools.title: CSV to JSON Converter
tools.desc: Convert CSV text into formatted JSON online for APIs, apps, mock data, and spreadsheet exports.

dev.name: Developer tools
dev.desc: Formatting, preview, hashing, and regex utilities for code-heavy workflows.

data.name: Data format tools
data.desc: JSON, SQL, and CSV utilities for structured data cleanup and inspection.

text.name: Text and writing tools
text.desc: Cleanup, counting, diffing, placeholder text, and character helpers for daily content work.

convert.name: Conversion tools

util.name: Utility generators
util.desc: Practical generators for passwords, UUIDs, and QR codes.
